use_cases: Interactive card controls within calendar views
AsChild pattern for polymorphic button composition
ai_summary: A reusable atomic button component with multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Built with Radix UI Slot for polymorphic rendering via asChild prop and class-variance-authority for consistent styling. Part of the Ruixen.UI calendar scheduler package, designed for desktop and mobile platforms with focus-visible accessibility states and disabled state handling.
